focusArea.title: Our Focus Areas
focusArea.description: Tifaouine is more than an association; it's a beacon of hope. We focus on three core pillars that transform lives and build sustainable futures.

education.title: Education
education.description: Empowering the youth through literacy, modern workshops, and specialized mentorship programs.

environment.title: Environment
environment.description: Preserving our natural heritage through reforestation and sustainable waste management initiatives.

communitySupport.title: Community Support
communitySupport.description: Building social safety nets and infrastructure that strengthen the bonds between our neighbors.

handsOn.title: Hands-on Experience
handsOn.description: Gain practical experience on the field, working directly with community projects.

amazingPeople.title: Amazing People
amazingPeople.description: Network with like-minded individuals and build lifelong friendships while doing good.

realImpact.title: Real Impact
realImpact.description: See the tangible results of your hard work in the smiles of the local community.

skillGrowth.title: Skill Growth
skillGrowth.description: Develop leadership, communication, and project management skills in real-world scenarios.

lifeAtTifaouine.title: Life at Tifaouine
lifeAtTifaouine.description: Moments of connection, hard work, and pure joy captured from our latest volunteer missions across the region.

fillForm.title: Fill the form
fillForm.description: Complete our online application with your basic details and motivation.

review.title: Application review
review.description: Our coordinators will review your skills and availability against our current needs.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: We'll schedule a brief interview to get to know you better and answer any questions.

start.title: Start volunteering
start.description: Join your team, attend an orientation, and start making an impact!

choosePath.title: Choose Your Path
choosePath.description: Two distinct ways to contribute, one shared vision. Find where your heart aligns with our mission.

member.title: The Members
member.description: Strategic anchors of the association, providing long-term governance and stability.

duties.monthly: Shaping the future through advisory board meetings.
duties.financial: A fixed annual fee to power the association's core.

member.requirements: Requirements: Professional background in education/social work, annual fee, and active strategic presence.

volunteer.title: The Volunteers
volunteer.description: The energetic heartbeat of our projects, bringing vision to life through direct action.

duties.ground: Physical presence at events and community workshops.
duties.project: Helping where the need is most immediate.
duties.community: Engaging directly with the families we serve.

volunteer.requirements: Requirements: 5 hours/week, passion for community, and attendance at our orientation program.

applicationForm.title: Application Form
applicationForm.subtitle: We are excited to have you on board.

placeholders.motivation: Tell us why you want to join Tifaouine...

fileUpload.cv: Upload PDF, JPG or PNG up to 10MB

response.success: Application submitted successfully! We'll contact you soon.
response.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.fullname: Full name must be 3-50 characters (letters and spaces only)
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phone: Please enter a valid Moroccan phone number (+2126XXXXXXXX or 06XXXXXXXX)
validation.address: Address must be at least 5 characters
validation.motivation: Please tell us more about your motivation (min 20 characters)
